query: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.seasonId, s.name as seasonName FROM teams t LEFT JOIN seasons s ON t.seasonId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%2026%' OR s.name LIKE '%Summer%' LIMIT 10;
